_comment: AP-ENGAGEMENT-LOOP-2026-05 · Lane 5 · Cron-trigger for the multi-social dispatcher. Fires every 5 minutes, POSTs to the social-dispatcher Edge Function with a shared X-Cron-Secret header. The Edge Function does the heavy lifting: scans scheduled_posts, fans out to all 7 adapters, writes post_results. This workflow stays thin on purpose — adapter logic lives in TypeScript next to the Postiz-style registry.
name: AP — Social Dispatcher Cron

_variables.SUPABASE_URL: Project Supabase base URL — same value used by the other n8n workflows in assetpersona/n8n.
_variables.SOCIAL_DISPATCHER_CRON_SECRET: Shared secret between this workflow and the social-dispatcher Edge Function. Set with `supabase secrets set SOCIAL_DISPATCHER_CRON_SECRET=...` and mirror the value into n8n env.
